title: Inputs
description: 32px height. Two groups: with label (forms) and without label (filters). Placeholder body-small neutral-6. Stroke neutral-3 inactive, neutral-5 active/filled. Text neutral-7 when filled. Width fills container by default.

variantGroups.label: With label
variantGroups.description: Used in forms. A caption-semibold label sits above the input.

variantGroups.label: Without label
variantGroups.description: Used in filters and compact contexts. No label above the field.
